plugins.publishCmd: docker buildx build --push --platform linux/amd64 --file apps/api/Dockerfile --build-arg APP_VERSION=${nextRelease.version} --tag ghcr.io/${GHCR_OWNER}/klar:${nextRelease.version} --tag ghcr.io/${GHCR_OWNER}/klar:${nextRelease.gitTag} --tag ghcr.io/${GHCR_OWNER}/klar:latest --cache-from type=gha,scope=klar --cache-to type=gha,mode=max,scope=klar .
